mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate over a 3-month window signals monetary easing that reduces the discount rate applied to equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns. The mechanism operates continuously without threshold activation.
evidence_refs: fact:Current FEDFUNDS at 3.0% provides room for rate cuts
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns following FEDFUNDS declines are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over a 3-month period, it signals labor market deterioration that triggers equity risk-off positioning, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as investors reprrice growth expectations.
evidence_refs: fact:Current UNRATE at 5.1% is moderate but subject to cyclical shocks
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with labor market vulnerability
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment signal, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any rolling 18-month window.

mechanism_narrative: A joint contraction in retail sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) signals weakening aggregate demand that reduces corporate earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days. The mechanism requires both series to decline simultaneously.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both decline > 2% month-over-month
evidence_refs: fact:Current RSAFS at 343623M and HOUST at 2038K units
failure_condition: Rank IC of the interaction term < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of co-decline instances.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) growth above its 12-month trend signals robust supply-side capacity utilization and pricing power, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days as profit margins expand.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in above-trend INDPRO periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment (PAYEMS) growth decelerates below 100K new jobs per month, signaling labor market softening that reduces consumer spending capacity and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS monthly change < 100K for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite weak payroll growth, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any rolling 18-month window.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation (CPIAUCSL) accelerates above 3.5% year-over-year while the federal funds rate remains below 4%, the real rate becomes negative, signaling monetary accommodation that supports equity valuations through reduced real discount rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Current CPIAUCSL at 194.1 and FEDFUNDS at 3.0%
failure_condition: Rank IC of the interaction term < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of negative real rate instances.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth (GDPC1) decelerates to below 1.5% annualized rate, signaling late-cycle weakness that compresses equity risk premiums and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days as recession probability rises.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of sub-1.5% growth periods.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) accelerate above 2000K units annualized while retail sales (RSAFS) grow > 0.5% month-over-month, signaling synchronized demand strength that supports corporate earnings and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST > 2000K annualized AND RSAFS MoM growth > 0.5%
evidence_refs: fact:Current HOUST at 2038K and RSAFS at 343623M
failure_condition: Rank IC of the interaction term < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of synchronized demand strength instances.
